overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a dystopian industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene begins with a character interaction beside a silver sports car, then follows the player character walking through gritty streets with elevated highways, industrial piping, and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street corner with combat cab building

events.description: character in blue jacket enters the driver's seat of the silver sports car
silver sports car accelerates and drives away down the street

agents.ego_description: standing near the parked car observing the interaction between the two characters

notable_agents.action: character in red outfit with purple hair standing beside the car
character in blue jacket entering the driver's seat

entered.detail: brown industrial building with checkered pattern and neon signage reading COMBAT CAB
massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars
futuristic silver sports car with checkered rear bumper and red taillights
large green industrial pipes running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at an industrial street corner beneath an elevated highway. A silver sports car is parked near the COMBAT CAB building. Two characters interact beside the vehicle - one in red stands outside while another in blue enters the driver's seat. The car then accelerates and drives away down the street.

events.description: moving from the parking area into the open intersection
waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the industrial intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection followed by a green car

entered.detail: wide asphalt intersection with crosswalk markings
large red industrial structure with metal walkways

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a wide industrial intersection beneath the elevated highway. The COMBAT CAB building and silver car are left behind as the character crosses the street. Vehicles pass through the intersection while the traffic light shows red. The industrial pipes now run along the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath elevated highway and pipes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway and industrial piping

entered.detail: metal pedestrian bridge connecting industrial buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk beneath the massive industrial infrastructure. The elevated highway and large pipes dominate the skyline. A metal walkway bridge spans across the street ahead. The red industrial building remains visible on the right as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with holographic advertisement and trash piles

events.description: passing the large green holographic billboard and seated pedestrians
encountering group of seated pedestrians near trash piles on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the holographic billboard and groups of people sitting on the sidewalk near trash piles

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting on cardboard near trash piles and a green holographic sign

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic advertisement display projecting from the building
piles of garbage bags and debris stacked on the sidewalk
pink neon signage on the red building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a more cluttered section of the industrial sidewalk. A large green holographic billboard glows brightly on the right, illuminating trash piles and several seated pedestrians. The red industrial building now looms closer with pink neon signage visible. The atmosphere feels more dense and urban.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between red industrial buildings

events.description: entering the narrow alleyway between red shipping containers and industrial walls

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow alley passage between red industrial structures

entered.detail: stacked red shipping containers forming a narrow passage
narrow opening between industrial structures leading deeper into the alley

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed alley between red shipping containers and industrial walls. The space becomes tight and sheltered, with the sky mostly blocked by overhead structures. The neon signs and holographic displays are left behind as the character proceeds into the darker industrial passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that transitions from an open street corner into a claustrophobic urban alley. It begins beneath an elevated highway where a silver sports car accelerates away from the Combat Cab building, leaving the camera to move forward into a wide intersection filled with passing traffic and heavy industrial piping. As the character crosses the street, the view expands to reveal a massive metal walkway bridge and a skyline dominated by concrete infrastructure and red industrial buildings. The scene then shifts toward a more cluttered sidewalk where a glowing green holographic billboard illuminates piles of trash and pink neon signage before the path narrows. Finally, the camera turns away from the bright displays to enter a tight, sheltered alleyway enclosed by red shipping containers and dark industrial walls.
